basic_details.job_title: BDL Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Walk in for 20 Posts
basic_details.job_type: Temporary / Contract (initially 1 year, extendable up to 4 years)
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Dynamics Limited (BDL) has released the BDL Recruitment 2026 Notification (Advt No. BDL/C-HR (TA & CP)/2026-1) on 27th May 2026 at the official website bdl-india.in. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced for the post of Project Engineer across Electronics (10 posts), Mechanical (5 posts), and Computer Science (5 posts) disciplines. The selection will be through a Walk-in Interview on 6th and 7th June 2026 at The Aeronautical Society of India (AeSI), Bengaluru. The upper age limit is 28 years for UR/EWS candidates as on 07.05.2026. Monthly salary starts at ₹30,000/- in the first ye

application_fee.details: There is no application fee for BDL Project Engineer Walk-in Interview 2026. No TA or DA will be paid to candidates attending the walk-in interview.

qualification.details: The upper age limit for BDL Project Engineer 2026 is reckoned as on 07.05.2026. Age relaxation is available as per Government of India rules. | Candidates must hold a First Class (60%) BE / B.Tech / B.Sc Engg (4 years) / Integrated M.E. / M.Tech in the relevant discipline from an AICTE-approved institution. For SC/ST candidates applying against reserved posts, 55% marks are sufficient. | No rounding off allowed (59.99% is not treated as 60%). Academic / Teaching / Internship / Project Work experience will NOT count as industrial experience. | All posts require a minimum of 1 year of post-qualification industrial experience in the relevant domain. Key areas per discipline:

salary_details.details: BDL Project Engineer salary starts at ₹30,000/- per month in the first year and increases to ₹39,000/- per month by the fourth year, plus an annual allowance of ₹10,000/- for medical, attire, and footwear expenses. | In addition, ₹10,000/- per year is paid in two instalments towards medical insurance premium, attire allowance, stitching charges, and footwear allowance. The contract is initially for 1 year, extendable up to a maximum of 4 years based on organisational requirement and individual performance.

selection_process: Selection for BDL Project Engineer 2026 is based on a total of 100 marks across three components. The minimum qualifying marks are 60% (with relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD as per Government rules).
75 Academic Marks - (1 mark per % of degree
max 75) 10 Post-Qualification Experience (1yr=3 pts · 2yr=6 pts · 3yr+=10 pts) 15 Walk-in Interview Performance
how_to_apply: BDL Project Engineer 2026 is a Walk-in Interview - there is no online application form. Candidates must appear directly at the venue with all required documents. Follow these steps:
Download the official BDL Recruitment 2026 notification PDF from bdl-india.in → HR section.
Download and print the Bio-data Form (Annexure-I) attached to the notification.
Fill the Bio-data Form in capital letters, affix a recent passport-size colour photograph, and self-attest all required documents.
Calculate your age as on 07.05.2026 and verify that you meet the upper age limit for your category.
Arrange one set of self-attested photocopies of all required documents (originals must also be carried for verification).
Reach The Aeronautical Society of India (AeSI), Suranjan Das Road, New Tippasandra, Bengaluru - 560075 (near Vivekananda Metro Station) by 09:00 AM on the interview date.
Submit your Bio-data Form and documents at the registration desk. Documents will be scrutinised to verify eligibility.
Eligible candidates will be called for the interview on the same day or a later day (candidates may need to stay more than one day at their own expense).
No TA or DA will be paid. Mobile phones and electronic devices are not permitted inside the venue.
Queries: Email [email protected] with subject line: Query-BDL/Walk-in/2026-1

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BDL Project Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: BDL Project Engineer 2026 is a walk-in interview — there is no online application form or last date. Candidates must appear directly at The Aeronautical Society of India (AeSI), Bengaluru on 6th or 7th June 2026 by 09:00 AM. Entry is strictly not allowed after 02:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in BDL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: BDL has announced a total of 20 vacancies for Project Engineer — 10 for Electronics, 5 for Mechanical, and 5 for Computer Science discipline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for BDL Project Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for BDL Project Engineer 2026 is 28 years for UR/EWS, 31 years for OBC (NCL), and 33 years for SC/ST candidates, all reckoned as on 07.05.2026. PwBD candidates get an additional 10-year relaxation over their category limit.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for BDL Project Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: BDL Project Engineer salary is ₹30,000/- per month in the 1st year, increasing to ₹33,000/- (2nd year), ₹36,000/- (3rd year), and ₹39,000/- (4th year). An additional ₹10,000/- per year is paid towards medical, attire, and footwear expenses.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification required for BDL Project Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a First Class (60% aggregate) BE / B.Tech / B.Sc Engg (4 years) / Integrated M.E./M.Tech in the relevant discipline (Electronics / Mechanical / Computer Science) from an AICTE-approved institution. SC/ST candidates need 55% for reserved posts.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for BDL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for BDL Project Engineer Walk-in Interview 2026. However, no TA or DA is paid to candidates for attending the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the BDL Walk-in Interview 2026 venue?
faq.answer: The BDL Walk-in Interview 2026 will be held at The Aeronautical Society of India (AeSI), Suranjan Das Road, Opposite Engine Division, Binna Mangala, New Tippasandra, Bengaluru – 560075. The nearest metro station is Vivekananda Metro Station.

faq.question: Q8. Is BDL Project Engineer 2026 a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No. BDL Project Engineer 2026 is a temporary/contract appointment initially for 1 year, extendable up to 4 years based on organisational need and individual performance. Candidates cannot claim regular employment at BDL through this appointment.

faq.question: Q9. What experience is required for BDL Project Engineer (Electronics) 2026?
faq.answer: Project Engineer (Electronics) candidates must have a minimum of 1 year of post-qualification industrial experience in areas including embedded systems, RF, power electronics, FPGA, LabVIEW, C/C++, VC++, control systems, and weapon checkout systems. Academic, teaching, internship, and project work experience do NOT count.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for BDL Project Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: BDL Project Engineer 2026 selection is based on 100 marks: 75 marks for academic percentage (1 mark per %, max 75), 10 marks for post-qualification experience (3 marks/1yr, 6 marks/2yr, 10 marks/3yr+), and 15 marks for walk-in interview performance. Minimum qualifying marks are 60%.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for BDL Project Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: BDL Project Engineer 2026 is a walk-in interview — there is no online application form or last date. Candidates must appear directly at The Aeronautical Society of India (AeSI), Bengaluru on 6th or 7th June 2026 by 09:00 AM. Entry is strictly not allowed after 02:00 PM.
